difficulty.reason: Frost-sensitive, needs staking, weekly sucker pruning, consistent watering

growth_stages.name: Seedling
growth_stages.look_for: Small plant with fuzzy stem and tomato-scented leaves

prompt.en: Rub a leaf gently and smell your fingers -- that's tomato smell!
prompt.da: Gnub et blad forsigtigt og lugt paa dine fingre -- det er tomatlugten!

growth_stages.name: Transplant & Establishment
growth_stages.look_for: Plant adjusting to outdoor life, new growth at top

prompt.en: Push the tall stick into the soil next to the tomato -- it needs something to hold onto!
prompt.da: Tryk den hoeje pind ned i jorden ved siden af tomaten -- den har brug for noget at holde fast i!

growth_stages.name: Vegetative Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Rapid stem growth, side shoots appearing at leaf joints

prompt.en: See the little branch growing in the V between the main stem and a leaf? Pinch it off!
prompt.da: Ser du den lille gren, der vokser i V'et mellem stammen og et blad? Knib den af!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Clusters of small yellow star-shaped flowers

prompt.en: Each bunch of yellow flowers will become tomatoes! How many bunches are there?
prompt.da: Hver buket gule blomster bliver til tomater! Hvor mange buketter er der?

growth_stages.name: Fruiting
growth_stages.look_for: Clusters of green tomatoes turning golden-orange

prompt.en: The ORANGE ones are ready! Twist gently and pop it in your mouth -- warm from the sun!
prompt.da: De ORANGE er klar! Drej forsigtigt og put den i munden -- varm fra solen!

human_readable.en: Water deeply every 1-2 days. Keep soil consistently moist. Avoid wetting leaves.
human_readable.da: Vand grundigt hver 1-2 dag. Hold jorden jaevnt fugtig. Undgaa at vaede bladene.

harvest.notes: Indeterminate: fruits continuously from mid-July until frost. Golden-orange when ripe, intensely sweet.

companion_plants.notes: Basil improves flavor and repels aphids. Borage attracts pollinators. Keep some distance from cucumbers in shared bed.

message.en: Tomatoes in {bed} need water urgently -- cracking risk!
message.da: Tomater i {bed} har akut brug for vand -- risiko for revner!

message.en: FROST ALERT: Cover tomatoes NOW or bring indoors! They will die below 2C.
message.da: FROSTALARM: Daek tomaterne NU eller tag dem ind! De doer under 2 grader.

message.en: It's very hot -- tomatoes may drop flowers. Extra water today!
message.da: Det er meget varmt -- tomater kan tabe blomster. Ekstra vand i dag!
